subcodes.first_line: O Lord of forgiveness, my Shelter and my Beloved! We have taken refuge at Thy Court of oneness, we are helpless ones at the threshold of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب غفورمز پناهمز و محبوبمز درگاه احدیتنه صغنمش بیچاره لرز و آستان عنایتنه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
